products.title: Philips Air Fryer NA231/00 (6.2L, 1700W, Touch Panel, Rapid Air Technology)
products.short_description: Philips Air Fryer NA231/00 with 6.2L capacity and Rapid Air Technology lets you cook crispy, healthy meals with up to 90% less fat, featuring a touch panel and cooking window.
products.long_description:
The Philips Air Fryer NA231/00 is a powerful and versatile kitchen appliance designed for healthier cooking with minimal oil usage. Equipped with patented Rapid Air Technology, it ensures even heat circulation for perfectly crispy and delicious results without the need for deep frying.

With a large 6.2-liter capacity, this air fryer is ideal for families and can handle a wide variety of dishes—from fries and chicken to baked goods and grilled vegetables. The intuitive touch panel offers 13 preset cooking modes, making it easy to fry, bake, roast, grill, reheat, and even dehydrate food.

A unique cooking window allows you to monitor your food without opening the basket, preserving heat and improving efficiency. The 1700W motor ensures fast cooking performance while consuming up to 70% less energy compared to traditional ovens.

Additionally, the appliance integrates with the HomeID app, giving access to 100+ recipes for daily cooking inspiration. With its non-stick basket, easy cleaning, and modern design, it’s a great addition to any kitchen focused on convenience and health-conscious cooking.
highlights: 6.2L extra large capacity for family cooking
Rapid Air Technology for even cooking
cons: Premium price compared to basic models
Fan issues reported by some users

positive: Very easy to use and clean
negative: Door alignment problems in rare cases

seo.meta_description: Buy Philips Air Fryer NA231/00 with 6.2L capacity, Rapid Air Technology, and 1700W power. Best air fryer for healthy cooking in India.
